requirement.title: Deterministic Rule-Based Validation
requirement.goal: Danh gia ket qua thuc thi bang bo validator co quy tac ro rang, tai lap duoc, khong su dung LLM de quyet dinh pass/fail.
rationale: Bao cao, regression diff va failure explanation deu can execution result co pass/fail on dinh.
TestCaseExpectation hien co da luu expected status, response schema, header checks, body checks, JSONPath checks va max response time.
Can tach ro execution khoi validation de de test va de mo rong sau nay.

inScope: Status code check tu ExpectedStatus json array.
Response schema validation tu TestCaseExpectation.ResponseSchema; fallback sang ApiEndpointMetadata.ResponseSchemaPayloads neu expectation khong co schema.
Header exact-match validation tu HeaderChecks dictionary.
JSONPath equality checks tu JsonPathChecks dictionary.
Max response time validation tu MaxResponseTime.
outOfScope: Complex assertion DSL voi operator >, <, regex, anyOf, custom scripts.
Contract diff report va coverage calculation.

acceptanceCriteria: AC-01: Neu actual status code khong nam trong ExpectedStatus thi test case Failed voi failure code STATUS_CODE_MISMATCH.
AC-02: Neu ResponseSchema ton tai va response body khong hop schema thi test case Failed voi failure code RESPONSE_SCHEMA_MISMATCH.
AC-03: HeaderChecks validate theo key khong phan biet hoa thuong, value compare exact sau khi trim.
AC-04: BodyContains va BodyNotContains su dung substring check deterministic, khong phu thuoc LLM.
AC-05: JSONPath checks support it nhat root, property, nested property, array index va so sanh scalar value.
AC-06: MaxResponseTime vuot nguong thi test case Failed voi failure code RESPONSE_TIME_EXCEEDED.
AC-07: Validation result chi ra tung rule pass/fail va danh sach failure reasons de FE-09 consume ve sau.
implementationOrder: 2. RuleBasedValidator voi schema validator + simple JSONPath selector.
3. Ket noi validator vao orchestrator va result collector.
4. Query result models de expose validation details.
